Just paid 2500pp for these. Finally something my IKSAR SK can wear.

Combo of 18ac and 11str and no negatives (Verant seems to like to add those to "balance")...pretty sweet
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: May 17 2001 at 9:12 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Man this thing OWNS for Monks! 18 AC and 11 str! WHOA!!
#Anonymous, Posted: May 18 2001 at 1:30 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Tell ME where it says A MONK can wear... My glasses may need cleaning <walks away> NOPE still doesn't say that a monk can wear. Sucks to be you if you thought you would be getting to twink your monk with it
#REDACTED, Posted: Jun 25 2002 at 1:21 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) LOL
#Anonymous, Posted: May 13 2001 at 12:54 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) u think a lvl 53 could go up to wastes and get these. Yeh right try lkike 55+ with 20 + 55 people. These are upgraded forms of naggy and vox out in western wastes. Know what your talking about before you say something stupid
#Anonymous, Posted: May 13 2001 at 7:36 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Hey Jackass, I had a couple of pieces of worked armor at 49,50. Might be a good idea to actually go to WW before you start calling people 'stupid'.
What Drops?
QuoteReply
# May 13 2001 at 9:45 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I am new to velious, could anyone please post what mob drops these in WW, I have more then enough support to get them, but I have no clue what drops them. Thanks
▲ Page top
RE: What Drops?
QuoteReply
# May 13 2001 at 5:06 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
~~>I am new to velious, could anyone please post what mob drops these in WW, I have more then enough support to get them, but I have no clue what drops them


Dragons drop them
There are many, many dragons in Western Wastes.
Dragon armor comes in different qualities (heavy, worked, peerless etc) and every dragon in WW has the potential to drop one or more pieces of it.
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: May 11 2001 at 6:17 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) hmmm.....my ranger is only 20 levels to low but I do have a few friends that might be willing to help....especially since I helped them on part of their epic:) ...and then there is the friend I keep supplied in foraged items for his brewing and baking...I might be able to get it in a few levels:) instead of 20!...I hope... I always like str since i'm a wimp and arms in one part of my armor that I still have banded...isn't that horrible!
RE: I want it!
QuoteReply
# May 14 2001 at 1:08 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Dont feel bad for not being twinked or "guild supported (as some may say)." I am a 37 iks war on BB wearing a mixture of trooper scale, cab scale, and banded. I am 90% untwinked - a high level shaman (Luminary?) gave me a war hammer from Old Seb one time for being nice to him. Also, i am in a newly formed guild where i am one of the highest level characters. Consequently, there will be no hand-me-downs for me.
